# Get Found by Calibre Studio, Full Reference

> Get Found is Calibre Studio's AI visibility offering: get your brand recommended when customers ask ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Grok, Perplexity or Copilot for the best option. This file gives AI agents the full context.

## The shift
Search changed. A growing share of buying journeys now start with a question to an AI assistant, not a list of blue links. The assistant answers with a shortlist of a few brands. If you are not in that shortlist, you are not in the consideration set, no matter how strong your brand is. Get Found is how Calibre Studio puts a brand into those answers.

## What it is
Get Found makes a brand easy for AI engines to read, understand, rate and recommend, scored on the DCAT method:
- Discoverability: can AI find you?
- Clarity: does it understand what you do?
- Authority: does it rate you?
- Trust: will it recommend you?

## The offerings
A ladder from a free check to always-on monitoring, so a brand can start small and scale.

### Free AI visibility check
A free 60-second score of how AI sees your brand. Reads your public site only, no card and no account. This is the entry point. Run it: https://indexed.calibrestudio.co/

### AI Visibility Audit and 90-Day Plan, €350 one-time
A full audit scored across all four DCAT layers, with plain-language findings ordered by severity and a dated, prioritised 90-day plan. Credited against the Sprint or a plan if you continue. https://getfound.calibrestudio.co/

### Get Found Sprint, €1,800 one-time
A done-for-you fix of what the audit found: site structure and schema, content and entities, citations and reputation. The fastest way to move the score. https://getfound.calibrestudio.co/

### Always-On Visibility, from €390/mo
Ongoing monitoring across the main AI engines, continuous fixes and a regular score report. Starter is €390/mo; Growth is €890/mo and adds active content and citation building plus deeper reporting. Three-month minimum. https://getfound.calibrestudio.co/

## Who it is for
Founders, marketing leads and creative teams who want to be the answer an AI recommends. Equally, brands that rank fine in traditional search but are missing from AI answers.

## FAQ

### How is this different from SEO?
Traditional SEO ranks your pages in a list of links. AI visibility, also called answer engine optimisation (AEO) or generative engine optimisation (GEO), decides whether you are named and recommended inside an AI-generated answer. They overlap but are not the same, and most analytics undercount the AI channel because the visit often arrives later through branded search.

### Which AI engines does it cover?
ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Grok, Perplexity and Copilot, plus Google AI Overviews, the engines most people now ask before they choose.

### Where does the free check end and the paid work begin?
The free check scores Discoverability and Clarity with confidence and gives a provisional read on Authority and Trust. The paid audit confirms Authority and Trust by running real queries across the engines, and the Sprint and plans do the fixing and monitoring.

### How fast can it change?
Structural fixes such as schema, agent files and clearer copy land immediately. Citation and recommendation shifts take a few weeks as engines recrawl.

## Use it
- Get Found, the offerings: https://getfound.calibrestudio.co/
- Free AI visibility check: https://indexed.calibrestudio.co/
- Calibre Studio: https://www.calibrestudio.co/
- AI services (Intelligence): https://www.calibrestudio.co/intelligence
- Book a call: https://calendly.com/calibrestudio

## About
Calibre Studio is a creative and AI studio between the Gold Coast and Paris, working at the intersection of art and technology. Get Found (Indexed) is its AI visibility offering; Directed is its brand and film work. Calibre runs both, from audit to rollout, under its Intelligence offering.
